name: Brown Rice with Sunflower Seeds and Grapes
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh thyme or
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and celery in oil until crisp-tender.
2. Stir in rice and thyme.
3. Add broth, bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat; cover, simmer 45 - 50 minutes.
5. Stir in sunflower seeds and grapes.
